svg.title: ZeroOps reference architecture for Ericsson IT
svg.desc: Five-layer reference architecture with ZeroOps platform at the centre, connecting Ericsson's IT estate and monitoring tools below to agentic AI orchestrators and IT operations teams above.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the ZeroOps workflow engine work?')
sendPrompt('How does the ZeroOps agent registry work?')
sendPrompt('How does the ZeroOps HiTL console work?')
sendPrompt('How does ZeroOps reporting and audit work?')
